case_title: GALVAN, JOANNA (MINOR) et al VS CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MAYOR'S OFFICE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GALVAN, JOANNA (MINOR) RIOS, EVODIA (GUARDIAN AD LITEM) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MAYOR'S OFFICE $1,150.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,150.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GALVAN, JOANNA (MINOR) RIOS, EVODIA (GUARDIAN AD LITEM) AS TO DEFENDANT CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MAYOR'S OFFICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-30-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-30-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-28-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAIVES DEFECTIVE CERTIFIED MAIL.
